title: Secure Offline RAG System
excerpt: Privacy-first document chat using fully local LLMs — no data leaves the machine.
description: Built a production-grade, fully offline Retrieval-Augmented Generation system that enables secure document querying without exposing sensitive data to public APIs.
problem: Client needed to query sensitive internal documents without exposing data to third-party cloud APIs.
solution: Built a privacy-first, locally-hosted LLM solution using Python, Ollama, and ChromaDB for vector search, with a clean CLI and web interface.
impact: Enabled instant, secure document retrieval with zero data leakage and sub-second query response times.

title: AI-Powered B2B Cold Email Outreach Engine
excerpt: Automated lead generation and personalized email drafting at scale using AI.
description: Developed a Python automation pipeline integrating AI to scrape leads, enrich contact data, and generate hyper-personalized cold outreach emails at scale.
problem: Manual lead generation and email drafting was taking hours per day, limiting outreach volume.
solution: Developed a Python automation script integrating AI to scrape leads from multiple sources and generate personalized outreach emails with dynamic templates.
impact: Scaled outreach volume by 10x while maintaining personalization quality, reducing time spent from 4 hours to 20 minutes daily.

title: Enterprise Server Alert Dashboard
excerpt: Real-time monitoring dashboards and automated alert pipelines for enterprise servers.
description: Developed real-time Python-based dashboards and automated email alert pipelines for enterprise server monitoring at Harman International.
problem: Slow incident response times due to manual server monitoring and delayed alert notifications.
solution: Developed real-time Python-based monitoring dashboards with automated email alert pipelines, integrating with existing infrastructure.
impact: Cut incident response times by over 90%, from hours to minutes, across a fleet of 200+ servers.
